description: Chronological feed of day-grouped journeys and place stays with single-expand accordion, companion map synchronisation, and hover highlighting.

actors.name: User
actors.description: Browses, expands, and interacts with timeline entries.

actors.name: Timeline System
actors.description: Builds the timeline feed from track and visit records.

validation.message: End time must be after start time
Trip name must be 255 characters or less
Trip end date must be after start date

values.name: all_collapsed
values.description: All day sections are collapsed; only day headings are visible.

values.name: day_expanded
values.description: Exactly one day section is open, showing its entries.

values.name: entry_detail_open
values.description: A journey entry's detail panel is open within the expanded day.

transitions.description: User clicks a collapsed day heading.
User collapses the currently open day.
User opens a different day; the previous day auto-collapses.
User expands the detail panel for a journey entry.
User closes the journey detail panel.

grouping: The timeline is grouped by calendar date in the user's local timezone, descending (most recent day first).
Each day section contains entries sorted chronologically ascending by started_at.
Journey and stay entries are interleaved in true chronological order within a day.
Days with no entries (no tracks and no confirmed or suggested visits) are not shown.
accordion: Only one day section may be expanded at a time; opening a day automatically closes any previously open day.
map_sync: When a day is expanded, the companion map pans and zooms to the bounding box of all GPS points recorded on that day.
When all day sections are collapsed, the companion map returns to a default full-history view.
Hovering a stay entry highlights the corresponding visit marker on the companion map.
Hovering a journey entry highlights its route line on the companion map.
lazy_loading: Journey detail data (segment breakdown, speed profile) is loaded at most once per entry per page session; subsequent toggles reuse the cached result.
trip_calculation: A trip's distance, route path, and visited country list are computed asynchronously after the trip's date range is saved.
If a trip's date range changes, all calculations are re-run.
Visited countries are derived from the distinct country labels of all GPS points within the trip's date range.

given: user navigates to the timeline feed
then: Query track and confirmed/suggested visit records ordered by date descending for the current user
timeline_loaded.result: Timeline renders with collapsed day groups. Most recent days appear at the top.

given: user clicks a collapsed day heading
then: Pan and zoom the companion map to the day's geographic bounding box
day_expanded.result: Day section opens showing journeys and stays interleaved chronologically. Map viewport updates.

given: user clicks a different day heading
then: Collapse the previously open day section
different_day_opened.result: New day opens; previous day collapses. Map updates to new day's bounds.

given: user clicks the currently open day heading to close it
day_collapsed.result: All day sections collapse. Map returns to full-history view.

given: user toggles the detail panel for a journey entry
detail data has not been loaded yet for this entry
then: Lazy-load segment breakdown (transportation mode, colour, distance) for the journey
journey_detail_opened.result: Detail panel expands showing mode breakdown. Companion map highlights the route with a flowing animation.

given: user toggles closed the journey detail panel
journey_detail_closed.result: Detail panel collapses. Map route highlight is cleared.

given: user hovers the cursor over any timeline entry
entry_hovered.result: Corresponding route segment or visit marker is highlighted on the companion map.

given: user moves cursor away from a timeline entry
user creates or updates a named trip with a valid start date and end date
then: Asynchronously calculate the trip's GPS path, total distance, average speed, and visited countries
trip_saved.result: Trip record is enriched with distance, route path, and country list.

trip_date_invalid.result: Trip cannot be saved. An inline validation error is shown next to the end date field.

errors.message: Trip end date must be after the start date.
Could not load timeline data. Please refresh the page.

events.name: timeline.day.expanded
events.description: A day section was opened by the user.

events.name: timeline.day.collapsed
events.description: All day sections are now collapsed.

events.name: timeline.journey.selected
events.description: User opened a journey's detail panel.

events.name: timeline.journey.deselected
events.description: User closed a journey's detail panel.

events.name: timeline.entry.hovered
events.description: User hovered over a timeline entry.

events.name: trip.calculated
events.description: A named trip's path, distance, and countries were computed.

related.reason: Provides the stay/visit entries that appear in the timeline feed.
Provides track records (journeys) rendered as timeline entries.
Companion map that syncs its viewport and highlights to timeline selections.

goals.description: Chronological feed of day-grouped journeys and place stays with single-expand accordion, companion map synchronisation, and hover highlighting.

success_metrics.measurement: Successful operations divided by total attempts
Failed operations divided by total attempts

human_checkpoints: before transitioning to a terminal state

tradeoffs.reason: UI must be usable by all users including those with disabilities

source.tech_stack: Ruby on Rails 8 + Stimulus + Turbo Frames + MapLibre GL JS
